entry_standard.headline: Take your time reaching {gate_name}
entry_standard.subtext: No rush at all. Enjoy the atmosphere and head to {gate_name} whenever you like.

entry_beat_crush.headline: Head to {gate_name} now to beat the rush
entry_beat_crush.subtext: The crowd is building up. It is better to enter through {gate_name} now before it gets too busy.

entry_step_free.headline: Easy, step-free route to {gate_name}
entry_step_free.subtext: We have found a comfortable, step-free path to {gate_name} for you. Just follow the signs.

entry_weather_covered.headline: Use {gate_name} to stay dry
entry_weather_covered.subtext: It might rain soon. This route to {gate_name} is mostly covered to keep you dry.

exit_standard.headline: Time to head towards {gate_name}
exit_standard.subtext: The match is finishing. You can start making your way to {gate_name} at your own pace.

exit_pre_peak.headline: Beat the Metro rush at {gate_name}
exit_pre_peak.subtext: The station will get very crowded soon. Leaving through {gate_name} now will save you a lot of time.

exit_after_ceremony.headline: Head to {gate_name} as the ceremony ends
exit_after_ceremony.subtext: The presentation is almost over. Better to start moving to {gate_name} now to avoid the exit crowd.

exit_weather_urgent.headline: Rain is starting, head to {gate_name} now
exit_weather_urgent.subtext: It is beginning to pour. Please move quickly to {gate_name} to reach covered transport.
